images.copyright: Flock of American flamingos, Isabela Island, Galápagos Islands, Ecuador (© Tui De Roy/Nature Picture Library)
images.title: Family, in full color
images.caption: National Cousins Day
images.desc: Today is National Cousins Day—a perfect excuse to reconnect with the people who know your family stories best and probably helped create a few of them. Think of cousins as your built-in crew: part family history, part lifelong adventure.

tooltips.walle: This image is not available to download as wallpaper.
